历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 Science/Physics Category minimum rankings approximately 4935→4007→7393→4459→4635, with significant fluctuations; in 2023, due to batch merger, there was an obvious backward shift to 7393, while 2024–2025 stabilized in the 4400–4600 range, with a 2025 baseline of approximately 4635; the university's enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category in Guizhou Province was 45 in 2021, 58 in 2022, 56 in 2023, 68 in 2024, and 67 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 94, a substantial expansion of about 40.3% compared to 2025, leading to significant changes in the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science Chinese University Ranking 2026 approximately 31st, stable in the 29–32 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of national universities; Douyin school popularity ranking 16th (high heat), with comprehensive heat about 3.1 million, reflecting high attention on short video platforms and a trend of increasing application heat; fifth round discipline evaluation A- and above totals 8: Chemistry (A), Mechanical Engineering (A), Business Administration (A), Civil Engineering (A-), Applied Economics (A-), Control Science and Engineering (A-), Electrical Engineering (A-), Computer Science and Technology (A-), with balanced strength in engineering and management disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation and other majors continue to be highly recommended, closely matching the university's advantageous disciplines; total number of Gaokao examinees in Guizhou Province in 2026 is about 299,000, estimated at about 209,000 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 70%, a slight increase from 207,000 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition; Hunan University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, adjacent to Guizhou Province, with strong regional preference; the university's enrollment proportion in its own province (Hunan) is about 25%, while in Guizhou Province it is about 1.5%–2%, indicating a moderate scale of out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical ranking fluctuations, the substantial expansion of about 40.3% in 2026, a slight increase in total examinees, and high Douyin attention, but the increase in examinees and the university's high attention offset each other; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 5726, with a range of 5226–6226.
